tips.item4: More detailed tickets get resolved faster

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about the platform.

contact.title: Didn't find what you were looking for?
contact.text: Talk to your Talent Manager or the platform administrator.

0.q: How do I apply for a badge?
0.a: Go to the badges catalog, choose the badge you want and click Apply. You can upload your evidence before or after submitting the request.

1.a: The process has two steps: first the Talent Manager reviews the evidence; then the Service Line Leader gives final approval.

2.a: There's no fixed deadline. You can track the request status in real time in the My Badges section.

3.q: What happens if my request is rejected?
3.a: You'll get a notification with the reason for rejection. You can review the evidence, improve it and submit the request again.

0.q: How do I download my certificate?
0.a: In the My Badges section, click on the earned badge and use the Download PDF Certificate button.

1.q: Can I export my badges to Excel or PDF?
1.a: Yes. In the reports areas you can export lists to Excel or PDF when your profile has permission to do so.

0.q: How does the points system work?
0.a: Each badge has a points value set by the administrator. When you earn a badge, the points are added to your profile.

1.a: They are advanced-level or higher-scoring badges, given special highlighting in the gamification system.

0.q: How do I change my password?
0.a: Go to settings in the side menu. In the security section you can set a new password.

1.q: Why am I not receiving notification emails?
1.a: Check that the email on your profile is correct and check your spam folder. If it persists, contact the administrator.
